title: HeadDrop
description: Claim Your Trophies – Every Kill Counts! ⚔️
body:
🎭 HeadDrop – The #1 Head Drop Plugin! 🎭

⚔️ Every Kill Tells a Story – Collect Heads & Show Your Victories! 💀

Make your Minecraft server more competitive and fun with HeadDrop! Collect heads from enemies, customize drop chances, enable leaderboards, and even get Discord alerts when rare drops happen!

🎯 Why Choose HeadDrop? 🎯

  • ✅ Player & Mob Head Drops – Collect heads from players and mobs with customizable drop chances.
  • ✅ Fully Customizable – Add lore, adjust percentages & more!
  • ✅ Looting Enchantment Boost – Increase head drop rates with Looting levels.
  • ✅ Special Mob Heads – Get heads for all types of mobs, including bosses.
  • ✅ Leaderboard System – Track top players who collect the most heads.
  • ✅ Discord Integration – Get real-time Discord notifications when heads drop.
  • ✅ Multi-Version Support – Works on multiple Minecraft versions.
  • ✅ Folia Compatibility – Seamlessly supports Folia.
  • ✅ Custom Sound Effects – Unique sounds for different mob head drops.
  • ✅ Highly Optimized – Designed for zero lag, even on large servers.
---

🔑 Permissions & Commands 🔑

  • 🎟 headdrop.head – Use /head to get a head.
  • 🎟 headdrop.reload – Reload the config with /headdrop reload.
  • 🎟 headdrop.notify – Receive plugin updates & alerts.
  • 🎟 headdrop.player – Enable head drops from players.
  • 🎟 headdrop.killer – Enable mob head drops when killed.
  • 🎟 headdrop.chance.* – Increase head drop chances per permission.
  • 🎟 headdrop.gui.move – Allow players to manage heads in the GUI.
---

🏆 Download HeadDrop & Dominate the Server! 🏆

💬 Support: Join our Discord for help & community!

---

  • 🚀 Lightning-Fast Performance – Perfectly optimized for large servers.
  • ⚡ Premium-Only Features – Unlock advanced customization and mechanics.
  • 🎧 Priority Support – Get faster updates and direct help from the dev.

📊 Stats & Analytics:

HeadDrop collects anonymous stats to improve performance.
